message.content:
@startuml
participant "Admin" as Admin
participant "Webhook\nServer" as WebhookServer
participant "Consumer" as Consumer

== Register webhook ==

Admin -> WebhookServer : 1 Register webhook\nconsumer
Admin <-- WebhookServer : 2 OK

== Event received ==

Admin -> WebhookServer : 3 Event
WebhookServer -> WebhookServer : 4 Store event\nin DB

== Consumer connected ==

WebhookServer <- Consumer : 5 Connect over WS

loop
    WebhookServer -> WebhookServer : 6 Load webhooks\nfrom DB
    WebhookServer -> Consumer : 7 Forward forwarding events
end

loop
    WebhookServer <-- Consumer : 8 Ack messages\nby webhook ID
end

@enduml
